title: polypodium reptans var. radicans
intro: Polypodium reptans var. radicans, also known as Creeping Polypody or Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Polypodium reptans var. radicans include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Polypodium reptans var. radicans can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin irritations.
